name: agentcert
description: AgentCert: the independent assurance and evidence layer for agents that take real actions.

scripts.mcpbench:check: ruff format --check . && ruff check . && mypy src/mcpbench && pytest
scripts.tripwire:lab-playwright-agent: npm run tripwire:build && npm --prefix packages/tripwire-ci run lab:reference -- --config examples/real-agents/playwright-agent/tripwire.playwright-agent.yml --out public-demo/real-agent-robustness/evidence/playwright-agent && npm run agentcert:lab-build
scripts.tripwire:lab-browser-use: npm run tripwire:build && npm --prefix packages/tripwire-ci run lab:reference -- --config examples/real-agents/browser-use/tripwire.browser-use.yml --out public-demo/real-agent-robustness/evidence/browser-use && npm run agentcert:lab-build
scripts.tripwire:lab-stagehand: npm run tripwire:build && npm --prefix packages/tripwire-ci run lab:reference -- --config examples/real-agents/stagehand/tripwire.stagehand.yml --out public-demo/real-agent-robustness/evidence/stagehand && npm run agentcert:lab-build
scripts.tripwire:lab-langgraph: npm run tripwire:build && npm --prefix packages/tripwire-ci run lab:reference -- --config examples/real-agents/langgraph/tripwire.langgraph.yml --out public-demo/real-agent-robustness/evidence/langgraph && npm run agentcert:lab-build
scripts.onegent:trusted-browser-demo: npm run onegent:build && npm --prefix packages/onegent-runtime run demo:trusted-browser
scripts.onegent:sandbox-certify: npm run onegent:build && node packages/onegent-runtime/dist/cli.js sandbox-certify --out .onegent/sandbox-certification
scripts.onegent:sandbox-conformance: npm run onegent:build && node packages/onegent-runtime/dist/cli.js sandbox-conformance --out .onegent/sandbox-conformance
scripts.agentcert:init: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-cli run build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js init
scripts.agentcert:report: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-cli run build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js report --mcpbench examples/reports/passing/results.json --out .agentcert/latest --subject demo-agent
scripts.agentcert:run-public: npm run agentcert:build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js run --profile public-demo
scripts.agentcert:lab-build: npm run agentcert:build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js lab build --config examples/real-agents/robustness-lab/lab.config.json --out public-demo/real-agent-robustness/evidence/lab-snapshot.json
scripts.agentcert:public-build: npm run agentcert:monitor-build && npm run agentcert:classifier-eval-public && npm run agentcert:lab-build
scripts.agentcert:monitor-build: npm run agentcert:run-public && npm run dashboard:build
scripts.agentcert:serve: npm run agentcert:monitor-build && node packages/agentcert-cli/dist/cli.js serve --corpus public-demo/browser-agent-robustness/evidence/agentcert-corpus.jsonl --artifact-root public-demo/browser-agent-robustness/evidence/tripwire-public-demo --static public-demo/agentcert-monitor --subject agentcert-public-demo
scripts.control-plane:install: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-dashboard ci && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-control-plane ci && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-sdk ci && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-mcp-adapter ci
scripts.control-plane:build: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-dashboard run build && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-control-plane run build && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-sdk run build && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-mcp-adapter run build
scripts.control-plane:test: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-dashboard test && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-control-plane test && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-sdk test && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-sdk run build && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-mcp-adapter test
scripts.semantic-calibration: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-control-plane run build && node packages/agentcert-control-plane/dist/semantic-calibration-cli.js --dataset datasets/agent-semantics/golden-v0.1.json --out .agentcert/compatibility/semantic-adapter-matrix.json
scripts.onboarding:e2e: npm --prefix packages/agentcert-dashboard run build && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-control-plane run build && npm --prefix packages/agentcert-cli run build && node scripts/external-onboarding-e2e.mjs
scripts.check: npm run tripwire:build && npm run tripwire:test && npm run onegent:build && npm run onegent:test && npm run agentcert:build && npm run agentcert:test && npm run vendor-sandbox:test
